title: Hardware Development
description: POCs using circuit design simulations for gate drivers and MOSFETs. High-voltage RF isolation for monolithic integration, PCB design and component placement, programmed analog RF receivers in VHDL.

title: M.Sc. Information & Communications Technology
description: GPA 1.9/5.0 (1.0 highest). Coursework spans Information Theory, Approximate Computing, Communication Systems, Mobile Communication, QoS, Cybersecurity, Machine Learning, and Advanced C++.

title: Application Developer — Salesforce
description: Built supply chain systems using Salesforce for Pfizer. Led team and served as Salesforce Integration contact. 2× Applause Awardee — recognized for performance and independence.

title: IC Design — Standard Cell Library
description: Created standard cell library to analyze radiation hardening of circuits for space applications using the ASAP7 7nm FinFET PDK.

title: B.E. Electronics & Communication Engineering
description: GPA 9.8/10 · Gold Medalist (1st in Batch) · Star of Excellence Award · Dean's List. Secretary of Robotics Club — Arduino, Raspberry Pi, C/C++, LabVIEW.
